name: Shubh Mehta
subRole: PMP® Certified | Lead Engineer @ Google Internal Stack | Expert in GenAI Orchestration

experience.description: Leading GenAI initiatives for global supply chain operations within the Google ecosystem. Architected high-impact applications using Gemini to automate server location policies. Mentoring multiple engineers and resolving technical blockers as a primary escalation point.

Led the migration from monolithic to modular frontend architecture, boosting velocity by 20%. Managed engineering interns and orchestrated task delegation for a 5-person pod using Angular and GoJS. Won Internal Hackathon prize for technical excellence.

Led POC initiatives using Microsoft Cognitive APIs for voice-to-text and sentiment analysis. Designed onboarding frameworks for UI hires and received CEO praise for technical innovation and delivery excellence.
